© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Key Takeaways:
o Before I even had a website I started building a list. The list has allowed me to sell
tens of millions of dollars in products.
o There are two key things that have led to my success:
o Focus on building a list
o Giving people what they want
o Most people never return to the websites they visit. Capturing someone’s email
address is key to this, with their email you can drive them back to your website
o When it comes to lists, bigger is not always better. Throughout the years, after all
the launches I’ve done and partnerships I’ve developed, I have the insight into
people’s lists. Over and over I’ve seen smaller lists outperform larger ones
o RFM - Recency, Frequency, Monetary:
o How recently someone joined your list
o How frequently they bought from you
o Monetary is at what transaction size and how much money
o We often see that if someone has just recently joined your email list they are a lot
more powerful. Launch lists are like a warm security blanket you can wrap around
you
o As an example, let’s imagine there are four “guru” Internet Marketing launches: A,
B, C, and D. When guru A launches all the other guru’s mail into his/her Prelaunch
content and that leads into a launch list
o There is usually a leaderboard to show who’s getting the most sales during these JV
launches. Generally, the person who had the most recent launch performs best for
the next JV Launch
o This example shows how powerful “recency” is…use it to your advantage
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Now I want to talk about one of my favorite topics which is lists; email lists.
If you have been watching my videos then you know I'm talking about list this and
list that, and I suppose the reason I love lists so much is because somehow I stumbled onto
the idea of building an email list way early in my career, actually before my career started,
actually before I even had a website, I started building a list and that has made all the
difference.
It has allowed me to sell tens of millions of dollars of my products and helped my
students and clients to sell hundreds of millions of their products.
There's two main things there that all my success goes back to...
o The first is that I have always focused on building a list.
o The second, I have always focused on only selling stuff that people want.
The main way that I found out what they want is my asking them via my list, so it all
goes back to the list.
If someone comes to your website, there is only one thing we can say for sure and
that is that they will absolutely leave your website sooner or later. They aren't going to leave
that browser window open for the rest of their lives. They will leave your website and once
they leave your website they will have forgotten about your website.
People are so busy and they bounce around so many different sites; they will just
forget about you and your site no matter how cool it is.
How many times have you been to a really cool site and then for some reason you
close your browser window, you got distracted, and you are like, "Wow, there's that really
cool site but I can't actually remember the name or how I got there or what it was, but you
know I just sort of half vaguely remember what it was about", and then maybe you will go
and search Google but you will find a thousand other sites and you won't actually get back
there.
The way you get around all that is, once you capture someone's email address and
they subscribe to you, then you can send them emails and drive them back to your site, drive
them back to your offer.
Lists are absolutely king.
Now, one of the most important things with lists is that, bigger is not always better
and because of my position in the industry, I get to see the inside of many, many launches.
There's lots of launches I help people out with. I have my platinum groups; I get to see what
is happening with their launches and then when I do my launches I get to see how other
partners, how their lists perform because they are sending me traffic so I can see all the stats
on their traffic and how their people convert.
I get to see inside all these lists and I see this over and over, how smaller lists can out
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

4
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
perform larger lists and this is not a new phenomenon. There is this old theory and it has
been proven over and over. It is called RFM and this goes back. This is old direct
marketing wisdom and it stands for "Recency, Frequency, Monetary".
o "Recency" is how recently someone took action. They either bought, how
recently they joined your list, how recently they bought from you.
o "Frequency" is how frequently they have bought from you.
o "Monetary" is at what ticket price; at what transaction size, how much
money have they spent with you.
In direct mail these are used, this is like gospel. For us, recency is more about how
recently someone has bought from you and that is incredibly important, in fact ultra
important but something we often see in email lists, is how recently someone has subscribed
to you.
If someone has recently joined your list, they are a lot more powerful and that is why
the next video I am going to talk about launch lists. That is why launch lists are so powerful.
If you have a fresh launch list, it is almost like this warm, security blanket that you
can just wrap around you and a launch list is a list that you have built during a launch and
this is something I have seen empirically over and over because in my market, this market of
teaching people how to build an online business, there is lots and lots of launches.
There are lots of JV Launches that are driven by affiliates and joint venture partners
and you know, if you just think about it, on a bigger picture, let us say, here is a launch 'A' by
guru 'A' and here is a launch 'B' by guru 'B' and here is a launch 'C' by guru 'C' and here is a
launch 'D' by guru 'D'.
Now a lot of times all these gurus will be supporting each other. They will be mailing
for each other, they will be affiliates for each other and what we will see is guru A in their
launch, they will put out these little sideways sales letter, there is their free videos and
during their sales letter, those will lead to this nice big launch list.
All these other partners will be mailing into their Prelaunch Content, mailing into
their Prelaunch Content, and that will enter the squeeze page and that will drive this launch
list for them. Then the same thing will go here, this person will have nearly three pieces of
Prelaunch Content and that will lead into a launch list for them and so on. In the end, each
one of them ends up with a launch list.
Let's just say this is January and February and March and April; four months in a
row. April, four months in a row. Four different people go into the market with a launch,
they each do the sideways sale letters, they each study product launch formula, they each
end up with a launch list. One of the things that happens in these big JV Launches is each
one of them will have all these affiliates promoting for each other and they will actually be
what they call a "leader board" and that leader board is where they will publish who are
the top affiliates, and there is often a big competition to see who the top affiliate is.
The way this works is we have this schedule here and let us just say we have already
done this launch right here.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Now we are onto 'B' is doing their launch and everyone is supporting 'B's' launch. 'A'
is mailing into their sideways sales letter and 'C' is mailing into their sideways sales letter
and 'D' is mailing into their sideways sales letter and there will be a competition between
thirty or forty different affiliates or joint venture partners, including 'A', 'B' or 'A', 'C' and 'D'
and they will all supporting launch for 'B'.
Guess who is going to win this contest, who is going to win that joint venture contest?
It is going to be 'A' right there because 'A' has the fresh launch list, it is only a month old,
they've got that recent list.
Now and it is not every single time, I am talking about most of the time. Now let's
flash forward into March. It is now March and now 'C' is doing their launch and we have got
'A' mailing into their sideway sales letter and 'B' mailing into their sideway sales letter and
'D' mailing into their sideway sales letters.
Guess who is going to win the contest, the JV contest, the affiliate contest for launch
'C'? It is going to probably be B because he has the fresh launch list, it's only a month old and
it will go on and it will be the same thing. We get to 'D' and it will likely be won by 'C'. That is
just the way it goes.
The reason I am pointing this out to you, I'll get into Joint Venture launches in a later
module; the only reason I am pointing this out to you is that it is just a striking example of
this idea of recency.
When you have a brand new launch list it is really, really powerful. That's what these
videos are about, launch lists and what it's going to mean for you and how to manage.
